goals.title: Deploy panel and node live smoke
goals.objective: Deploy the v0.1.1 pinned self-hosted panel stack to the management VPS and the node agent stack to the node VPS using the public installer/upgrade path, without leaking secrets. Verify HTTPS, certificate automation, panel health, node enrollment/trust handshake, node command polling, port-conflict safeguards, and visible operator warnings.
goals.evidence: Live G014 complete after v0.1.2 patch release. Panel VPS 89.185.85.184 upgraded via signed manifest /secure/lumen-release-v0.1.2.json using public installer commit 2fffcb5; encrypted backup /opt/lumen/backups/lumen-backup-20260527T181558Z.tar.gz.enc created; compose ps shows api/web/subscription v0.1.2 digest-pinned and healthy; external HTTPS health for panel/sub domains returned 200 and API live ok; doctor checks docker/curl/openssl/nginx/config/loopback-ports/certs/compose/free-node-limit/panel-health ok. Node VPS 85.192.60.8 upgraded through install-node.sh to ghcr.io/rim2393/lumen-node-agent:v0.1.2@sha256:6b3bf008b01294ab629f9689eb368744463d904ca607209453dd411b07bf0f74 with NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=1; node state now persists node-id/heartbeat-path/node-token. Panel API shows smoke-node-01 active with fresh last_seen_at 2026-05-27T18:21:01Z. Safe capabilities.report command abe0de77-7b43-49ad-889e-2b36bf151bb5 completed succeeded with claimed/completed timestamps and runtime metric command_polled=1 command_completed=1. Live failure found and fixed before completion: v0.1.1 node-agent used node name for command/metric UUID paths; main commit 0b55fca persists enrolled node id and public commits 0edda16/2fffcb5 enforce TLS default and pin v0.1.2 images. Local node-agent npm test passed 37 tests; public installer validation run 26529872921 passed.

goals.title: First protocol live connection path
goals.objective: Implement and verify the first real protocol path end to end after the v0.1.1 deploy: create a profile/host/user in the panel, push runtime config to the node agent, ensure the protocol listener is actually reachable, generate a subscription link, import/validate it through the client compatibility fixture, and document evidence before moving to the next protocol-by-protocol stage.
goals.evidence: G015 live protocol path complete on v0.1.4. Main repo commits d29cfe9 and 3298dd9 added tcp-smoke manifest/API/node-agent live listener and registered backend adapter; public installer commits afb799f/fcbb7da pinned v0.1.4/v0.1.3 and node host networking/live flags; client commit 09f47a4 accepts tcp-smoke manifests. GitHub Actions release-images run 26532245170 built and verified v0.1.4 GHCR images; public installer validation run 26532407309 passed. Panel VPS 89.185.85.184 upgraded via signed manifest /secure/lumen-release-v0.1.4.json with backup /opt/lumen/backups/lumen-backup-20260527T190307Z.tar.gz.enc; doctor and API health passed, running api/web/subscription v0.1.4 digest-pinned. Node VPS 85.192.60.8 upgraded to ghcr.io/rim2393/lumen-node-agent:v0.1.4@sha256:2cda1a1873fc92374247f0a2fac3d4ec78746ac0c040aee8574cd75fe2c27537 with LUMEN_DRY_RUN=false, LUMEN_ENABLE_LIVE_SMOKE=true, NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=1, network_mode=host. Live API created user/license/squad/profile/host/subscription; command 3b186adb-063f-40f7-b569-77088a200917 completed succeeded with implementationStatus=live-listener-active on port 28771; external TCP read returned banner lumen-g015-ok; manifest saved to D:\lumen-work\.deploy-secrets\g015-live-manifest.json and python tools/validate_subscription_fixture.py --require-nodes returned ok; cleanup outbound.remove a0592963-61bb-4169-98dc-44b0d7da8a23 completed live-listener-stopped and external port check returned refused.
